choices: Compares DUT output to an independently computed expect
Only prints waves for human eyeballing
Copies DUT output into expect automatically
items.explain: Golden expect must not be copied from the sampled DUT output.

items.prompt: When got does not equal expect, the usual response is…
items.explain: Explicit fail paths make regressions visible.

items.prompt: A golden model in directed TB is…
choices: A reference function separate from the DUT output
The same net as DUT y wired in a circle
items.explain: Expect comes from a model—bitwise AND, add, mux select—not from reading y first.

items.prompt: Setting expect equal to the DUT output you just read is a valid self-check.
items.explain: That tautology checks nothing; expect must be computed independently.

items.prompt: Before comparing combinational outputs, the TB typically…
choices: Waits a delay or clock edge so signals settle
items.explain: Sample after #1 or posedge so got reflects settled logic.
